title: 'I saw the threat call': Mamata claims police forced doctors to release Abhishek
content: Trinamool MP Abhishek Banerjee was assaulted and abused by protesters in Sonarpur while visiting the home of a party worker allegedly killed in post-poll violence. Chased, pelted with objects, and his shirt torn, Banerjee blamed BJP workers for a planned attack. He plans to approach higher courts, while the BJP denied involvement and highlighted TMC's past actions against their workers.

title: DK Yes: Citing fuel price hike and traffic jams, Shivakumar opts for low-key ceremony
content: D K Shivakumar will be sworn in as Karnataka's 25th Chief Minister on June 3rd at 3:30 pm, following months of political maneuvering and a power tussle with Siddaramaiah. The simple ceremony at Lok Bhavan aims to reflect the party's commitment to public service and avoid inconvenience to citizens.

title: Watch: Massive meteor explosion rattles houses across northeastern US
content: A meteor exploded over the northeastern United States on Saturday, unleashing a sonic boom equivalent to 300 tons of TNT. The bright daytime fireball, estimated to be about three feet wide, fragmented approximately 40 miles above the ground, startling residents across multiple states and causing buildings to shake.

title: IPL Final: Kohli vs Siraj, Gill vs Bhuvneshwar - Five key player battles
content: Royal Challengers Bengaluru and Gujarat Titans clash in the IPL 2026 final. Key individual battles, including Sai Sudharsan vs. Jacob Duffy and Shubman Gill vs. Bhuvneshwar Kumar, are poised to significantly influence the outcome of this high-stakes championship match.

title: Video: Mamata loses her cool at hospital authorities with Abhishek on stretcher
content: A video shows Mamata Banerjee confronting hospital officials in Kolkata, reportedly over her nephew Abhishek Banerjee's treatment after an alleged attack. BJP leaders criticized Banerjee, accusing her of pressuring the hospital despite reports of no major injuries. The incident follows an alleged stone-pelting attack on Abhishek Banerjee during a visit.

title: One of Denmark's biggest pension fund blacklists IPO of Elon Musk's Spacex
content: A major Danish pension fund, AkademikerPension, will not invest in SpaceX's upcoming IPO. The fund cites severe overvaluation and a deeply flawed corporate governance model. They believe Elon Musk's near-absolute control poses significant risks. Other institutional investors also express concerns about SpaceX's proposed governance structure. This decision highlights investor caution regarding the aerospace giant's public debut.

title: Ghaziabad 'Bakrid invite' murder: Main accused Asad shot dead in encounter
content: Ghaziabad police have shot dead Asad, the main accused in the fatal stabbing of Class 11 student Surya Chauhan. Asad, who was on the run with a Rs 50,000 bounty, allegedly opened fire on police during an attempt to apprehend him. He succumbed to injuries at the hospital. An injured constable is also undergoing treatment.

title: RCB vs GT Final: One year after Chinnaswamy stampede, Bengaluru Police issues strict advisory
content: Bengaluru Police have issued a stern advisory for the IPL 2026 final, urging fans to celebrate responsibly following last year's tragic stampede. Public gatherings, unauthorized LED screens, live screenings outside venues, firecrackers, bike rallies, and public intoxication are prohibited. Authorities emphasize cooperation to ensure safety and prevent disorder.

title: Watch: US strikes another vessel in 'narco-trafficking' routes, killing three
content: In a bold move against drug trafficking, US military forces have launched a series of airstrikes on vessels suspected of transporting narcotics in the eastern Pacific, leading to the demise of several individuals involved. This operation underscores a renewed effort to dismantle Latin American drug cartels and halt the relentless influx of illegal drugs into the United States.

title: 'Amazon would collapse if run like New York City': Jeff Bezos takes swipe at Mamdani
content: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos has endorsed New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani's new government efficiency initiative, COGE. This comes after their public disagreement on taxing the wealthy. Bezos, who previously criticized city spending, now supports Mamdani's plan to make government work smarter, suggesting savings could benefit lower earners.

title: Are human soldiers being replaced? How Ukraine's 'silent death' robots are fighting Russia
content: Ukraine's war against Russia is transforming into a conflict dominated by machines. Robots and drones are now performing dangerous missions, replacing human soldiers on the frontlines. This shift is driven by Ukraine's troop shortages. Unmanned systems are carrying explosives, delivering supplies, and providing reconnaissance. This technological revolution offers a glimpse into the future of combat.

title: 2 restaurant owners in Bengaluru held for selling beef as mutton
content: Bengaluru police arrested two men for allegedly deceiving customers by serving beef disguised as mutton at their restaurant. Investigations confirmed the allegations after plainclothes officers verified complaints. The owners were booked under the Cow Slaughter and Cattle Prevention Act and sent to judicial custody.

title: More muscle, less fat, same deadly swing: How Bhuvneshwar is defying age at 36
content: At 36, Bhuvneshwar Kumar is still outrunning younger pacers. While generations of fast bowlers have come and gone since his IPL debut in 2011, the RCB veteran remains a constant. TOI traces the fitness transformation, meticulous preparation and daily discipline that have helped him stay relevant in cricket's most demanding format for more than a decade.

title: Microsoft CEO's Copilot ‘confusion fix’ that left employees laughing in townhall
content: Microsoft is reportedly developing a 'super app' to consolidate its confusing array of Copilot AI tools. This unified platform aims to end customer frustration by offering a single destination for various AI assistants, including coding, chat, and collaboration features. The app, expected by summer's end, will allow seamless switching between personal and work accounts, simplifying Microsoft's AI ecosystem.

title: Without water, gas and power, Eid turns into nightmare in Pakistan's Karachi
content: Karachi residents endured a grim Eid-ul-Adha marked by severe water, gas, and power outages. Families struggled to cook and preserve meat amid sweltering heat, leading to widespread protests. Despite official assurances, essential services failed, forcing many to resort to costly alternatives and endure immense hardship during the festival.

title: NFL Trade Rumors: Chiefs eye Bears TE and Giants pass rusher
content: The Kansas City Chiefs have been linked to two potential trade targets in ESPN's offseason simulation. One proposal would bring Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet to Kansas City for a 2027 third-round pick, while another would send New York Giants edge rusher Kayvon Thibodeaux to the Chiefs for a 2027 fourth-rounder. The rumors address Kansas City's needs at tight end depth behind Travis Kelce and pass-rush help entering the 2026 season.

title: 'Drishyam 3' BO day 10: Mohanlal film sees weekend rise
content: Mohanlal's latest mystery drama is experiencing a robust second weekend, with collections seeing a significant jump on Saturday. The film has now surpassed Rs 91 crore in India net collections and a remarkable Rs 219 crore globally, driven by strong performances in Kerala and overseas markets. This success positions it for further box office milestones.

title: Titans take on champions: Shubman Gill, Rajat Patidar chase legacy as GT and RCB eye 2nd IPL crown
content: Defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru face Gujarat Titans in a thrilling IPL 2026 final. Both teams boast in-form captains, Rajat Patidar and Shubman Gill, and formidable batting line-ups. The contest promises a compelling clash of consistent teams, with RCB aiming for a second consecutive title and GT seeking to leverage home advantage.

title: 'Offered to fly Abhishek to Hyderabad': Mamata on how Rahul reached out to help
content: TMC supremo Mamata Banerjee revealed that Rahul Gandhi offered assistance for Abhishek Banerjee's medical treatment following an alleged attack in West Bengal. Gandhi condemned the incident as an assault on democracy, while the TMC blamed BJP-backed supporters, a claim the BJP denies.

title: The titans of Gujarat: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan have transformed Gujarat Titans into a batting powerhouse, combining consistency, class and record-breaking partnerships. With eight century stands and nearly 3,000 runs together, the opening pair has emerged as one of T20 cricket's greatest duos, giving GT a formidable edge ahead of the IPL final against Royal Challengers Bengaluru.

title: Trump to kick off US 250th anniversary concert celebrations but without several artists who quit
content: President Trump will launch the Great American State Fair next month after several artists withdrew due to political concerns. Organizers Freedom 250 announced Trump's June 24 kick-off in Washington, D.C. Trump himself suggested replacing the departed performers with a "Make America Great Again Rally" for the nation's 250th anniversary.

title: Spurs vs OKC Thunder Game 7: Magic Johnson reacts to Wembanyama vs SGA
content: The Western Conference Finals between the Spurs and Thunder have reached a dramatic Game 7, with NBA legend Magic Johnson calling it “must see TV.” Victor Wembanyama and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander enter the decisive matchup carrying enormous expectations after leading their teams through a hard-fought series. While Oklahoma City leans on experience and home-court advantage, San Antonio has embraced its underdog mentality and youthful confidence.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Packers, Lions emerge for Colts’ $33M QB landing spot
content: The Indianapolis Colts’ star player Anthony Richardson is actively seeking a trade since the last few weeks even as he continues to attend the team’s OTAs, sparking confusion among all the fans. While a number of teams have been linked to him, it seems the Green Bay Packers and the Detroit Lions have emerged as strong landing spots for the star player.

title: Ash Kaashh’s cryptic post sparks concern amid Josh Jacobs controversy
content: The Green Bay Packers’ star player, Josh Jacobs, is staring at an uncertain future in the new season, just days after he was released from police custody after an alleged domestic violence situation involving his girlfriend, Ash Kaashh, has sparked chaos among fans. While Josh Jacobs has strongly denied all the charges through his legal team, Ash Kaashh’s recent post has raised eyebrows.

title: Coco Gauff and Jalen Sera net worth 2026: Inside their growing fortune
content: Coco Gauff and Jalen Sera’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at around $36 million. Coco holds most of the wealth through tennis prize money, endorsements, and business ventures. She has earned over $24.3 million in career winnings and works with brands like Rolex and New Balance. Jalen Sera lives privately and focuses mainly on music and creative projects.

title: PSG celebrations in France spark clashes; 416 detained, 7 police officers injured
content: Over 400 people were arrested across France following Paris Saint-Germain's Champions League victory, as celebrations devolved into violence. Clashes erupted between police and supporters in Paris and near the stadium, resulting in injuries to seven officers and damage to vehicles and businesses. Authorities had deployed extensive security measures amid concerns of disturbances.

title: 'Equivalent to 300 tons of TNT': Meteor 'explosion' over northeast US rattles residents
content: Residents across Massachusetts and New England reported hearing a loud boom and feeling buildings shake on Saturday afternoon. The American Meteor Society believes a meteor approximately three feet wide entered Earth's atmosphere near the New Hampshire-Massachusetts border, causing the disturbance. While many witnessed the event, it's unlikely the object struck the ground.

title: Ranveer Singh's peace offer to Farhan & Zoya Akhtar over 'Don 3' gets rejected
content: Ranveer Singh's olive branch to Farhan Akhtar over the ongoing 'Don 3' saga has been firmly declined. In an effort to smooth things over, Singh suggested a joint cinematic venture involving both Farhan and Zoya Akhtar, but Excel Entertainment wasted no time in rejecting the offer. Read the full article to know more about the dispute in detail.

title: 'I would give him the freedom': Tendulkar backs Sooryavanshi for Tests challenge
content: Young batting prodigy Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has captivated cricket fans and legends alike, with Sachin Tendulkar calling him "truly special" after his record-breaking IPL 2026 season.  Sooryavanshi's phenomenal 776 runs and 72 sixes have sparked debate about an India call-up, though Tendulkar advises patience for Test cricket, emphasizing nurturing his natural talent and avoiding undue pressure.

title: Delhi: 9 rescued after 5-storey building collapses in Mehrauli; several still feared trapped
content: A five-storey building near Saket Metro station in south Delhi collapsed Saturday evening, with several people feared trapped. A coaching institute operated on the ground floor, and construction was ongoing upstairs, raising concerns about students being among those caught in the massive debris. Rescue operations are underway, involving fire services, police, and local residents.

title: ‘If I get picked...’: Shubman Gill sends message amid India T20 selection debate
content: Despite being out of India's T20I plans, Shubman Gill remains focused on improving his game and is open to a national recall. He last played a T20I in December 2025 and was subsequently left out of the T20 World Cup squad. Gill's strong IPL 2026 form, however, has reopened the conversation for his potential return to the shortest format.

title: 'I sent my elder son Aryaman to study finance, but he still chose acting', says Bobby Deol
content: Bobby Deol has revealed that both his sons, Aryaman and Dharam, are keen on pursuing careers in the entertainment industry, despite his efforts to expose them to different career paths. Speaking on Aap Ki Adalat, Bobby opened up about his children's interests, their talents and why the lure of cinema continues to attract the next generation of the Deol family.

title: PSG retain Champions League title after penalty shootout win over Arsenal
content: Paris Saint-Germain clinched a historic second consecutive Champions League title, defeating Arsenal 4-3 on penalties after a 1-1 draw. Despite an early Arsenal lead, PSG fought back, with Dembélé equalizing from the spot. Missed penalties from Eze and Gabriel ultimately cost Arsenal, handing PSG another European crown and cementing Luis Enrique's managerial legacy.

title: General Subramani takes charge as new Chief of Defence Staff
content: Gen. N.S. Raja Subramani was serving as the Military Advisor at the National Security Council Secretariat and he retired as the Vice Chief of Army Staff on July 31 last year

title: Murder of student in Ghaziabad: Main accused killed following encounter with police
content: Asad, a resident of the Khoda area, was wanted in connection with the stabbing of Surya Chauhan, who succumbed to his injuries while undergoing treatment and was later pronounced dead

title: Onion farmers seek ₹10,000 crore revival package, stable export policy from Centre
content: Bharat Dighole, founder-president of the Maharashtra State Onion Growers Farmers Association, said that farmers have suffered huge losses over the years due to what he termed flawed export policies, spurious seeds, storage losses and other factors

title: 'Ugly face of BJP's politics of revenge': Opposition leaders condemn attack on TMC's Abhishek
content: Stones, eggs and abuses were hurled at the Diamond Harbour MP when he visited Sonarpur town on the outskirts of Kolkata to meet the family of a TMC worker who was allegedly killed in post-poll violence

title: Para-athlete Chirag Tyagi found dead in Ghaziabad
content: The body of the deceased has been sent for post-mortem examination, said the police, adding that the para-athlete may have been shot

title: Second-life surgery | Surrendered Maoists in Maharashtra reverse vasectomies for family life
content: As men in Maharashtra’s Maoist-affected Gadchiroli district give up arms, their outlook on life has changed. This report discusses how they are reversing the vasectomies that a life of resistance in the forest had forced them into

title: News in Frames | Bringing water to a scorching desert
content: The Indira Gandhi Canal serves as a critical water supply resource for Jaisalmer and thousands of remote desert villages; yet scarcity persists, with many still relying on ancestral wells as concerns over groundwater depletion and canal maintenance remain

title: D.K. Shivakumar | ‘Rock’ of Congress
content: The party’s crisis manager, known for his organisational skills and grassroots networks, is set to become Karnataka’s Chief Minister

title: Mob attacks Trinamool leader Abhishek Banerjee; Mamata blames it on BJP
content: Police and Central security personnel escort the Trinamool general secretary out of Sonarpur, where locals had surrounded him

title: Bengaluru traffic constable’s act of kindness amid flooded road wins hearts online in viral video
content: The video shows a traffic constable, identified as Anil of the Byatarayanapura Traffic Police Station, dressed in an orange raincoat, trying to help a physically challenged person cross the road

title: Delhi High Court’s pathbreaking ruling on Google keyword advertising | Explained
content: Justice Mini Pushkarna assessed if a company can buy another’s registered trademark as a keyword on Google Ads to have their ads appear first in searches for that trademark

title: Kochi sailor who endured Equatorial Guinea’s detention feels relieved with international tribunal’s verdict
content: Kochi-based sailor Sanu Jose was the chief officer of Heroic Idun when the vessel was detained by Equatorial Guinea on charge of violating their territorial waters and attempt to steal crude oil

title: Oppn. accuses Kochi Mayor of ‘abuse of power’ over extension of biomining agreement
content: LDF alleges that the contract with the company engaged in biomining legacy waste was renewed after its expiry without the council’s approval

title: Kochi Corpn. to seek explanation from LED streetlight contractor
content: The Mayor announces the decision at the council meeting after councillors level severe criticism against the contractor and accuse him of indifference that exposes them to public ire

title: Pune hooch deaths rise to 22; several officials suspended
content: The 22 suspended officials include three officers from the Pune police force, six from the Pimpri Chinchwad police force, and thirteen from the state excise department.

title: Malls, e-commerce hit school accessories market hard
content: Retailers say prices have risen only marginally this year, blaming weak sales on cautious consumer spending and a shift towards e-commerce

title: Bihar government suspends two IAS officers over corruption charges
content: According to Special Vigilance Unit (SVU) sources, a contractor named Rishu Shree sponsored foreign trips and bore the expenses of air travel for the IAS officers in exchange for securing contracts.

title: Building collapses near Saket metro station; 8 persons rescued, several feared trapped
content: The building fell on an adjacent tin-shed canteen where a few children were having dinner. They are also feared to be trapped under the debris

title: DMK holds meeting to mobilise ‘Gen Z’
content: Referring to discussions on the local body elections due in the State, N.R. Elango said Tamil Nadu could even witness another Assembly election.

title: The Sulur horror story of child sexual assault and murder
content: The shocking sexual assault and murder of a 10-year-old girl near Sulur in Coimbatore comes as a reminder that constant vigilance and creating a safe society for women and girls should be among the top priorities for the new government in Tamil Nadu

title: From collapse to comeback: Tungabhadra dam in Karnataka gets new lease of life
content: Nearly two years after Gate No. 19 was washed away, the historic reservoir stands renewed with all 33 crest gates replaced; it is set to be inaugurated by month-end

title: Karnataka: Amid hectic discussions, curiosity grows over new Cabinet formation
content: CM-designate D.K. Shivakumar is expected to visit New Delhi shortly for consultations with the high command on Cabinet formation, appointment of Deputy Chief Ministers, and selection of the Assembly speaker

title: Mettur dam may not be opened for irrigation on June 12
content: Giving an account of the situation on the water front, a senior government official says the storage of the dam is “not even 50%”

title: Minister inaugurates Katpadi MLA office in Vellore
content: Katpadi MLA Mr. Sudhakar told The Hindu that the office will remain open between 9 a.m and 6 p.m on all days

title: State Highways opens new bridge near government hospital in Walajah
content: The bridge is expected to end the ordeal of crossing the Walajah-Sholinghur High Road for school students and hospital staff

title: Tangedco replaces electrical poles damaged by strong winds in Tiruvannamalai
content: Residents also urged Tangedco officials to ensure uninterrupted power supply in the area due to rising heat

title: Kerala CM directs withdrawal of suspension order of school Principal
content: Principal was suspended just two days before his retirement for allegedly sharing through his Facebook account content insulting the Chief Minister

title: RFP to be floated for Amaravati Economic Region development plan
content:
CM tells officials to develop housing complexes for lower and middle-income groups; special 
tribunal to resolve disputes involving buildings and unauthorised constructions in capital region

title: Firing incident indicates deteriorating law and order, says Pralhad Joshi
content: Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution says that the firing incident at Tadasinakoppa near Dharwad was an indication of the deteriorating law and order situation in the twin cities

title: NEET paper leak: Court extends Hawaldar's CBI custody by two days; remands Mandhare to judicial custody
content: Delhi court also issued notice to the CBI on the bail application filed by another accused, Manisha Waghmare, who sought relief on medical grounds citing illness

title: D.K. Shivakumar meets Governor Gehlot, stakes claim to form new govt in Karnataka
content: Governor Thaawarchand Ghehlot, in a communique to Mr. Shivakumar, has invited him to take the oath at 4.05 p.m. on Wednesday; it is expected to be a simple event at the Glass House on the Governor’s residential premises.

title: Defence Minister inaugurates ‘Nausena Shaurya Vatika’ in Lucknow
content: ‘This is not an ordinary tourist destination...it will encourage people to pause and reflect on the tremendous contributions of those who safeguard our daily lives,’ Rajnath Singh says

title: West Bengal Cabinet expansion on June 1
content: Sources say the Cabinet will have more than 30 members; apart from seniority and experience, the party leadership is likely to consider regional and community representation while selecting new Ministers

title: CUET-UG 2026 hit by technical glitch; NTA says re-test will be conducted for 3,765 candidates
content: Technical service provider TCS says the issue on May 30 was resolved and the test resumed without any impact on its sanctity

title: Fair electoral rolls lead to fair polls: CEC
content: The poll body chief was attending a conference aimed at strengthening EC’s legal framework and strategy; hails role of Booth Level Officers and Booth Level Agents in electoral roll management

title: CBI arrests nominated Member of Cantonment Board on graft charge
content: The accused has been identified as Satish Kumar Sharma. He was posted as the nominated Member of the Cantonment Board in Uttar Pradesh’s Meerut

title: 'Chor, Chor To Eggs, Stones: How Attack On Abhishek Banerjee Unfolded
content: Abhishek Banerjee claimed to have inside information about the alleged outsiders involved in the attack, claiming that they had been mobilised through a Facebook live session before his arrival in Sonarpur.

title: Ghaziabad Man Who Stabbed Friend After Bakrid Invite Killed In Encounter
content: The development comes days after 17-year-old Surya Pratap Chauhan was allegedly stabbed by Asad and his accomplices in Ghaziabad on May 28, the day of Bakrid.

title: US Struck Commercial Ship Trying To Breach Blockade 'After 20 Warnings', Reach Iran
content: The Gambia-flagged cargo ship Lian Star ignored more than 20 warnings from US forces overnight as it tried to enter an Iranian port.

title: US Says Capable Of Resuming War With Iran As Deal Remains Elusive
content: The United States warned on Saturday it was "more than capable" of resuming its war with Iran after President Donald Trump said any peace deal must adhere to his red lines, including Tehran...

title: VD Satheesan Revokes Principal's Suspension Over Online Post Targeting Him
content: S Javad, Principal of the Government Model Boys' Higher Secondary School, Attingal, was suspended on Friday following allegations that he had posted insulting content against the chief minister on social media.

title: Sue Tilley Met Lucian Freud In 1990s. Her Nude Painting Could Now Fetch $47 Million
content: Lucian Freud, a grandson of psychoanalyst Sigmund Freud, is famed for fleshy nudes of friends, family and the artist himself.

title: 'George Floyd'-style Death Triggers Protests In Dublin
content: Protesters in Dublin demanded "justice" Saturday for a Congolese man who died after he was restrained by security guards, in an incident likened to George Floyd's murder in...

title: 'He Could Have Died': Mamata Banerjee On Nephew Abhishek Banerjee's Assault
content: Videos showed Abhishek Banerjee in a white shirt and a cricket helmet, walking amid a huge crowd shouting and grabbing at him.

content: US Iran War LIVE Updates: US President Donald Trump had on Wednesday dismissed an Iranian state media report that Iran and Oman would jointly manage shipping through the Strait of Hormuz

title: 12 Rescued As 5-Storey Building Collapses In South Delhi, Search Ops Continue
content: The building had a coaching institute on the ground floor and construction work was underway on upper floors. It is suspected that those trapped maybe students.

title: How Municipal Poll Setback Brought Congress Factionalism To Fore In Punjab
content: The ruling Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) swept the local body polls, winning 958 wards. The Congress managed to secure only 397 wards, reigniting concerns within the party over leadership, internal unity and electoral strategy.

title: Ukraine Is Using Soldiers That Don't Need Food Or Water To Kill Russians
content: Drones, robotic vehicles and remotely controlled weapons platforms are now playing a growing role in Kyiv's war effort, giving it a technological advantage against a larger Russian force.

title: Bengal CID Serves Summons To Abhishek Banerjee In 'Fake Signature' Probe
content: The notice, described by CID sources as a summons directing him to appear for questioning at the agency's Bhabani Bhavan headquarters at noon on Monday.

title: US Aircraft Fires Missile At Ship For Iran Blockade Violation
content: The United States has been enforcing a blockade of Iranian ports as Tehran effectively halts all traffic through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: 'Enhancing Capabilities For China, Pakistan's 2-Front Challenge': Navy Chief
content: Admiral Tripathi said the Navy's efforts are not aimed at any specific nation, but rather at ensuring the absolute security of India's maritime interests.

title: No Ambulance Or Doctor, Pregnant Woman Carried On Shoulders, Baby Dies
content: With no proper road and ambulance in the village, the woman's family had no choice but to carry her on their shoulders for kilometres down rocky paths

title: INDIA Bloc Revival In Bengal? Support For Mamata Banerjee Over Nephew's Assault
content: Abhishek Banerjee, one of the party's most prominent leaders, was assaulted by a mob in Sonarpur, South 24 Parganas, where he had gone to meet the victims of the post-election violence. Several INDIA Bloc members criticised the attack.

title: Karnataka Politics Live Updates: DK Shivakumar Meets Governor, Stakes Claim As Chief Minister
content: Karnataka Politics Live Updates: A change in leadership in the three-year-old Karnataka government appears imminent, with Siddaramaiah having sought an appointment with Governor Thaawarchand Gehlot, reportedly to tender his resignation.

title: Keep an eye on ‘radicalisation centres’ in border areas: Amit Shah
content: Bharti Jain is senior editor with The Times of India, New Delhi. She has been writing on security matters since 1996. Having covered the Union home ministry, security agencies, Election Commission and the ‘prime’ political beat, the Congress, for The Economic Times all these years, she moved to TOI in August 2012. Her repertoire of news stories delves into the whole gamut of issues related to terrorism and internal strife, besides probing strategic affairs in India’s neighbourhood. Read More

title: In outreach to Bangladesh PM, India hails his father's 1971 address
content: former Bangladesh president zia-ur-Rahman recalls his radio address of 1971 . he proclaimed the country's independence and called upon the people to resist the army . zia, father of current PM Tarique Rahman, described him as one of the bravest sons of the nation .

title: Medical miracle or MAGA marvel? Trump's doctor says he has heart of someone 14 years younger
content: the white house released a three-page medical memo late Friday . the memo states that president Trump possesses "excellent" cognitive and physical performance . he turns 80 on april 14 and is the oldest person ever sworn into the Oval Office .

title: Maharashtra: 80 lakh women removed from Ladki Bahin scheme as e-KYC deadline ends
content: state government sources say there are no plans to extend the e-KYC deadline or admit new beneficiaries . the actual count now stands at 1.66 crore, down from the initial 2.46 crore . despite appeals from women who missed the cut-off, officials stated that a further extension is not on the cards .

title: From Sidda to DKS: Congress hopes Karnataka change of guard will blunt anti-incumbency, fill gaps
content: the transition from siddaramaiah to Shivakumar is rooted in the informal arrangement that was made at the time of the selection of CM following a keen tussle between the two for the top post . sources said the transition comes at the right time to start with a clean slate to blunt the anti-incumbency that sets-in in the state for every govt .

title: End of an era for Air India colonies in Mumbai’s Kalina as last of the occupants leave
content: colony ends after 70 years of legacy MUMBAI: beginnings can often be muted . last of its 150-odd residents began vacating their flats on Sunday . the last of the occupants will leave, and Mumbai International Airport Ltd will take possession of the land leased to it two decades ago .
